# Saltwater Studio

Saltwater Studio is a remote web-design studio founded in 2025 by Travis Abadie on Florida's Gulf Coast, building premium, search-optimized websites for service businesses nationwide.

## Services

- Web Design (Next.js, schema-first, performance-optimized): https://saltwaterstudio.xyz/services/web-design
- SEO / AEO / GEO (Google ranking, AI search visibility, entity strategy): https://saltwaterstudio.xyz/services/seo-aeo-geo
- Google Presence (Google Business Profile setup and optimization): https://saltwaterstudio.xyz/services/google-presence
- Social & Content (weekly content engine, brand-consistent, AEO-aligned): https://saltwaterstudio.xyz/services/social-content

## Portfolio

- Beach House Moving: https://beachhousemoving.xyz
- Kai's Run: https://kaisrun.xyz
- BashSnippets: https://bashsnippets.xyz

## Case Studies

- Beach House Moving (county-level local SEO build): https://saltwaterstudio.xyz/work/beach-house-moving
- Kai's Run (entity + AEO for a new service category): https://saltwaterstudio.xyz/work/kais-run
- BashSnippets (AI-citation-optimized content site): https://saltwaterstudio.xyz/work/bash-snippets

## Contact & Booking

- Contact / Quote: https://saltwaterstudio.xyz/contact
- Book a strategy call: https://saltwaterstudio.xyz/book

## Area Served

United States (nationwide). Heartland: Gulf Coast, Florida — Gulf Shores, AL to Miami, FL.

## Entity Facts

- Studio name: Saltwater Studio
- Founded: 2025
- Founder: Travis Abadie
- Location: Gulf Coast, FL (remote studio — no street address)
- Tagline: "Depth, by design."
